subject: [PATCH v6 12/20] nfsd: add helper to marshal a fattr4 from completed args

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds a new helper function `nfsd4_encode_attr_vals` to the NFS server code, which marshals attribute values from completed arguments into a JSON object. The function breaks out the encoding of actual attr_vals field into a separate function, making the code more modular and easier to maintain.
